elasticmapreduce.cluster.autotermination: An auto-termination policy for an Amazon EMR cluster. An auto-termination policy defines the amount of idle time in seconds after which a cluster automatically terminates. For alternative cluster termination options, see [Control cluster termination](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/emr/latest/ManagementGuide/emr-plan-termination.html).

elasticmapreduce.cluster.autotermination.Description: Specifies the amount of idle time in seconds after which the cluster automatically terminates. You can specify a minimum of 60 seconds and a maximum of 604800 seconds (seven days).
